externalUrls.title: ✨7 day trial of my bestselling housework app

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Search GemmaBray on YouTube to watch. ❤️🍿#cleaning #housework #houseworkhelp
We roll on MONDAY! (Last full cycle before the summer hols…😱🤯) YOU IN?!
🎙What is TOMM and How Can it Help You? All the info you need about TOMM is over on the link in my bio ❤️❤️❤️❤️ Gem x

This is THE most asked question, so let's get it answered. 👇👇👇👇
⁠
❤️Firstly if you're new then welcome, you're going to LOVE it here! I will hold your hand and walk you back to calm. ⁠
⁠
🏡If your house is in need of a housework reset then check out the Messy House Bootcamp or the Clutter Buster (both of which are free to download on the blog - the link is in my bio).⁠
⁠
🙌Then you can jump into the 30-minute-a-day method (the method is also free to download via the link in my bio). Don't worry if the rest of TeamTOMM is not on week 1 - just jump in wherever we are, you don't have to wait until the start of a new cycle. ⁠
⁠
💻 Join the free Facebook group (search The Organised Mum Community). You'll find loads of friendly faces (140k(ish) at the last count) all there to support and lift you up(there is no such thing as a silly question).⁠
⁠
📱If you have tried the free printouts and want to make TOMM more specific to you and your lifestyle then there is the TeamTOMM app (android and apple). Which will help you to change the days around and make up your own cleaning lists. ⁠
⁠
There’s loads more I can tell you about ... the three books, the podcast, and the guided clean-a-longs on Patreon but I don't want to overwhelm you if you're new. Start with the above and if you want to know more then please check out the link in my bio. ⁠
⁠
If you have any questions the support team are an email away on support@theorganisedmum.blog ⁠
⁠
Great to have you here ❤️ Gem ❤️

Hey there if you’re new 👋👋 The Organised Mum Method (TOMM) is a realistic way to keep on top of your home. I created it 16 years ago when I was struggling to keep on top of the housework as a new mum. If you want to have a home that looks great, have weekends that are free of cleaning AND still have time in the week to get on with the stuff that you actually enjoy … then you are in the right place.
.
​​So How Does it Work?.
.
​​There are 3 levels of jobs and if you want a handy tick-list with suggested jobs for each room then you can download all the printables for free! Just hit the link at the top of this page. 
.
Before you get started though: I want you to look at the lists of jobs as suggestions. A bit like a pick and mix of things that you can do. If you want to truly customise TOMM then you can download the TeamTOMM app and make TOMM fit you and your home to a T!
.
So glad you’ve found the page 😍
All next week on the #TeamTOMM podcast it is #hallowclean 👻 so get ready for some spooky fun and expect the unexpected!

latestIgtvVideos.title: Week 6: Organised Christmas
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
The controversial week ...
Want disposable baking trays? Then buy them now, they'll be cheaper.
Want to go out out on NYE? Get it booked in NOW! 🍾
Until next week .... elves out! 🎄

latestIgtvVideos.title: 🏠 What's the Point❓
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Thanks for watching everyone 💕 For more info about the work that I do please visit www.theorganisedmum.blog

latestIgtvVideos.title: 🎁Week 4🎁 Organised Christmas
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
💰MONEY💰 This week is all about your budget. 
HOW much do you want to spend? Set a realistic budget that you will be able to stick to. Write down everything you will need to buy (don't forget things like wrapping paper, cards, tickets for events, etc.) 
WHO are you going to be buying for? Again make a list and set an amount you want to spend for each person. 
Gem 💕

latestIgtvVideos.title: 🦄Week 3: Organised Christmas🎄
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Sorry about the noise of my fan 🤣 OK Here's the recap: 

🎄Have a freezer/pantry clear out and use up as much food as you can. This will 
1) help you make space for Xmas food and also save you money on your current food bill. You can then repurpose it for the Xmas budget. This is the perfect week as the Friday Focus this week is "room of your choice" (I don't just throw this together you know 🤣)
💥Do you want a fancy advent calendar this year? Have a look and see what's about so you don't get disappointed! 

Don't forget to comment to be in with a chance of receiving a random act of Xmas kindness. 💕

Have a wonderful week ❤️ Gem x
Vid credit: Elf (The Movie)

latestPosts.caption: Hi, when you don’t have time to clean to perfection you HAVE to prioritise and that is what cleaning in the margins helps you do.  Gem xxxx
Do you want to get into a simple (but highly effective) housework routine before summer hits? Hit follow and I’ll show you how ❤️❤️❤️ #cleaningroutine #cleaningmotivation #theorganisedmum #cleaning
Let’s play a game … genuinely productive or possibly toxic? 👀🥴

Never underestimate the power of a bitesize clean and tidy (even if it is just 15 minutes) And we are going to be putting that 15 mins to very good use today!  The two 15 min sessions that dropped today are perfect to fit into the margins 🎉 Find them@now in the Hot New Drops section of The Organised Method app ❤️❤️

Tuesdays can be tricky especially if you’ve got multiple bedrooms. But for the cleaning in the margins challenge remember that we’re just doing priorities, we’re building a habit so we don’t need a full on reset today. Trust the process 🩷🩷

It’s ok I’ve got you. The trick is to have a plan and luckily for you can borrow mine 😍 I’m going to be cleaning in the margins this summer which means grabbing time when I can and making very very good use of it. The foundation to that plan will be @the_organised_method so when I have those little pockets I can refer to the list, pick up where I left off and use my time wisely. 

Because I don’t know about you but I don’t want to spend the summer cleaning (or shouting at the kids 😩)

The aesthetic version of a task and the actual task are not the same thing 👀
Your brain doesn’t always know the difference. But your house does 🥴

I made a whole YouTube video about this because it needed more than a carousel. ❤️❤️❤️
Love, Gem x
Got to love a softer more forgiving cleaning routine 🩷#cleaning #theorganisedmethod #cleaningroutine

You know that feeling of disconnect that sometimes comes with your home? Maybe you’ve cleaned for hours and it still doesn’t sit quite right, something feels a bit off (but your can’t quite put your finger on it?) Well I have a theory. 
I think it is really tempting to see lovely things around us, in the media, on socials or even in your best friend’s house and for us to love it and then try and copy and paste that into out own life and home. But it never really works (or hardly ever) and I think this is because that effort is going into the aesthetics rather than the feeling. 
Does that make sense? I found a lot more peace with my home when I started to ask myself how I wanted it to feel, rather than look, when I put the feeling first the aesthetics naturally fell into place and it started to feel mine and ‘right’. Just a theory but a potential one to think about if your home always feels bit ‘off’ and you are not sure why. Gem xxxx
What is cleaning in the margins and why does it work? #cleaningroutine #cleaningmotivation

We’re making a YouTube series and we need you! 
This isn’t a cleaning show. It’s bigger than that.

This isn’t just about the house, but the whole thing. The mental load and the juggling and the feeling that you’re holding everything together (with your bare hands).

What we’re looking for:
The new parent who doesn’t know which way is up
The one doing it all alone with no backup
The person who wants to build something but can’t find the time
The one who has lost themselves somewhere along the way

If you read one of those and thought that’s me, we want to hear from you.

We’re filming is this summer, UK based, and we’ll come to you (I’ll bring the cakes!).

To apply, send a 60 second video to contact@theorganisedmum.com telling us what your overwhelm actually looks like. Not the tidy version. The real one.

Can’t wait to help!! Love, Gem x
On Fridays we clean deeper ….. but we’re still cleaning in the margins
